Senior Product Manager

Leading enterprise investment platforms that power better decisions at scale.

Senior Product Manager and CFA Charterholder at J.P.Morgan Chase, leading multiple squads delivering core platform services, analytics, and AI-enabled tooling for thousands of users across Spectrum.

Selected Work

Five core Spectrum platform products spanning design systems, telemetry, support, dashboards, and AI-enabled workflows — plus independent NLP and machine learning research at the University of Bath.

SpectrumIQ

Led SpectrumIQ — a new AI chat experience — as a governed platform product aligned with Spectrum's broader product strategy.

Role
Senior Product Manager
Company
J.P.Morgan Chase

Delivered AI-enabled tooling to thousands of internal users, integrated within Spectrum's core product governance model.

View case study

Spectrum Design System

Owned roadmap and delivery for the design system establishing consistent portfolio workflows and experience standards across Spectrum.

Role
Senior Product Manager
Company
J.P.Morgan Chase

Accelerated product delivery and raised experience consistency across a 100+ application platform estate.

View case study

Telemetry and Analytics

Led strategic telemetry and analytics capabilities, including Pendo.io integration, to bring product insight to thousands of Spectrum users.

Role
Senior Product Manager
Company
J.P.Morgan Chase

Established shared platform insight across 100+ applications, enabling more informed product and governance decisions.

View case study

Help and Support

Owned Help and Support as a core platform product, raising experience consistency and reducing fragmented support approaches across Spectrum.

Role
Senior Product Manager
Company
J.P.Morgan Chase

Delivered a consistent, governed support experience for thousands of internal Spectrum users.

View case study

Dashboards

Led a strategic dashboards product to improve workflow visibility and consistency for thousands of internal users across Spectrum.

Role
Senior Product Manager
Company
J.P.Morgan Chase

Delivered shared portfolio visibility supporting consistent workflows for thousands of internal users across the platform.

View case study

MSc Thesis — NLP and ML for Support Ticket Classification

MSc dissertation applying NLP and machine learning to classify 12,000+ annual support tickets on Spectrum — awarded Distinction by the University of Bath.

Role
MSc Researcher
Company
University of Bath

Achieved 83.21% F1 Score on unseen support ticket data, demonstrating that TF-IDF and SVM classification can automate enterprise support triage at scale — with an estimated $9.15 saving per automated ticket.

View case study

Charles Beard, CFA, builds enterprise investment platform products for global asset management.
